name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in a Cookie
description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext within browser cookies. Attackers can use readily available tools to intercept or read cookie values, compromising user data such as credentials or session tokens.
detection_pattern: Look for EGRESS nodes (cookie set, Set-Cookie header) carrying sensitive data from INGRESS or STORAGE nodes without a TRANSFORM mediator (encryption, secure token generation) that protects the data before it is placed into the cookie.
